positive: detailed scene with a young woman in a vibrant, sunset-drenched forest at dusk; she is standing on a moss-covered stone pedestal amidst several tall trees, wearing a flowing white wedding dress with intricate lace details and a delicate silver necklace, her hair styled in loose waves; the sky behind her is ablaze with warm colors of orange, pink, and purple.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail
